title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO NO. 2 ELEMENTARY SCHOOL OF LAOAG, ILOCOS NORTE, TO AGRIPINO P. SANTOS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1337 / 58 OG No. 22, 4275 (May 28, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 3353, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF BARRIO NO. 2 ELEMENTARY SCHOOL OF LAOAG, ILOCOS NORTE, TO AGRIPINO P. SANTOS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name "Barrio No. 2 Elementary School" in the Municipality of Laoag, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby changed to Agripino P. Santos Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
